name: Harris v. Viegelahn
question: When a debtor in good faith converts a bankruptcy case from Chapter 13 of the Bankruptcy Code to Chapter 7, are the undistributed funds held by the Chapter 13 trustee refunded to the debtor or distributed to the creditors?
description: A case in which the Court held that any assets acquired after the date of filing for Chapter 13 bankruptcy must be returned to the debtor when the bankruptcy is converted to Chapter 7.
